_comment: M2 Web 端 MVP feature list. M1 (Shared infrastructure) is complete (v0.1.0). M2 builds on M1's schemas/loader/render-pipeline rather than redoing them. Canvas features follow the 4-phase roadmap from docs/6canvas动态化交互设计spec.md (MVP → V1 → V2 → V3).
sourceDocs: docs/PRD.md §8 (Poster templates — packages/poster as single source)
docs/5完整Prompt文件.md (Prompt file library — 12 prompts with frontmatter + include + variables)
docs/2satori长图组件.md (Poster rendering — primitives, icons, tokens, render-server)
docs/6canvas动态化交互设计spec.md (Canvas interaction design — 4-layer, 9 entries, rhythm layering, dramatic 4-act)

features.description: Replace PalmReadingResult schema with rich prompt-spec structure (meta/overview/mainLines/auxiliary/temperament/summary/disclaimer). M1's simple personality/career/love/health structure does not match the actual LLM output described in docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §五.
acceptanceSteps: Replace packages/core/src/schemas/palm-reading.ts with new Zod schema matching docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §五 output schema

Top-level fields: meta{title,subtitle}, overview{heading,body}, mainLines[{name,icon,body}] (3 items: 感情线/智慧线/生命线), auxiliary[{icon,label,body}] (2-3 items), temperament{heading,body}, summary{heading,body,illustration}, disclaimer{label,body}
Schema validates the example JSON from docs/5完整Prompt文件.md line 519 (the standard answer) without errors
Schema rejects malformed JSON missing the summary.illustration field
Update packages/core/src/schemas/__tests__/palm-reading.test.ts to use the new structure
pnpm --filter @cyberoracle/core test passes; existing import sites in barrel-exports.test.ts still work

features.description: Replace FaceReadingResult schema with rich prompt-spec structure matching docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §六. Same shape as PalmReadingResult but mainLines covers 眉眼/鼻子/嘴部/脸型 with icons eyebrow|eye|nose|mouth|face.
acceptanceSteps: Replace packages/core/src/schemas/face-reading.ts with new Zod schema
mainLines accepts 3-4 items with name in [眉眼,鼻子,嘴部,脸型] and icon in [eyebrow,eye,nose,mouth,face]
auxiliary, temperament, summary, disclaimer fields match palm-reading shape (reusable sub-schemas in helpers if needed)
Schema validates the example JSON from docs/5完整Prompt文件.md line 663 without errors
Update packages/core/src/schemas/__tests__/face-reading.test.ts to use the new structure
pnpm --filter @cyberoracle/core test passes

features.description: Replace DailyFortuneResult schema with rich prompt-spec structure (title/date/ganzhi/solarTerm/ratings/lucky/advice/oneLine) per docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §七.
acceptanceSteps: Replace packages/core/src/schemas/daily-fortune.ts with new Zod schema

Fields: title (literal '今日心境速写'), date, ganzhi, solarTerm (string, can be empty), ratings{overall,work,relationship,creative,rest} (each 1-5 integer), lucky{color,direction,number(0-9 int),moment}, advice{do,avoid}, oneLine
Schema validates the example JSON from docs/5完整Prompt文件.md line 743 without errors
Schema rejects ratings.overall=6 (out of 1-5 range)
Schema rejects lucky.number=10 (out of 0-9 range)
Update packages/core/src/schemas/__tests__/daily-fortune.test.ts; pnpm --filter @cyberoracle/core test passes

features.description: Add VisionObservation schemas — the JSON contract for stage-1 VLM output (palm + face). VLM returns either {valid:true, observations:{...}} or {valid:false, reason:'not_palm|minor|low_quality|unsafe|not_face|multiple_faces'}.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/src/schemas/vision-observation.ts with PalmObservationSchema and FaceObservationSchema
Both use Zod discriminated union on 'valid' field (true → observations, false → reason enum)
PalmObservation observations fields per docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §三: hand_shape, finger, palm_proportion, heart_line, head_line, life_line, fate_line, minor_lines, skin_texture, image_quality (all string)
FaceObservation observations fields per §四: face_shape, forehead, eyebrow, eye, nose, mouth, chin, skin_texture, expression_impression, image_quality
Reason enums: palm=[not_palm,minor,low_quality,unsafe], face=[not_face,minor,multiple_faces,low_quality,unsafe]
Test file: schemas/__tests__/vision-observation.test.ts with valid/invalid cases for both
Export both schemas from schemas/index.ts barrel; pnpm --filter @cyberoracle/core test passes

features.description: Extend prompt loader with expandIncludes() function — resolves <<include:safety-rules>> markers by inlining content from packages/core/prompts/_shared/{name}.md.
acceptanceSteps: Add expandIncludes(text:string):Promise<string> to packages/core/src/prompts/loader.ts
Function replaces all <<include:NAME>> matches (where NAME matches [\w-]+) with the content of packages/core/prompts/_shared/NAME.md (trimmed)
Function throws descriptive error 'Include not found' when _shared/NAME.md does not exist
Multiple includes in one text are all replaced (loop over matchAll)
Test file: prompts/__tests__/expand-includes.test.ts with 4 cases (single include, multiple includes, no include, missing include)
Export expandIncludes from prompts/index.ts barrel

features.description: Create shared prompt segments — _shared/safety-rules.md and _shared/tone-guidelines.md per docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §二. These are referenced by 8+ downstream prompts via <<include:>>.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/prompts/_shared/safety-rules.md with the 10-point content safety checklist + 措辞要求 + 遇到无法处理的输入 sections
Create packages/core/prompts/_shared/tone-guidelines.md with 整体定位 + 风格关键词 + 具体写作要求 + 中文表达细节 sections
expandIncludes('<<include:safety-rules>>') returns the content of safety-rules.md
expandIncludes('<<include:tone-guidelines>>') returns the content of tone-guidelines.md
Test file: prompts/__tests__/shared-segments.test.ts verifies file existence + non-empty content + key phrases present

features.description: Create vision-observe-face.md prompt file per docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §四. Stage-1 VLM prompt for face observation, outputs JSON matching FaceObservation schema.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/prompts/vision-observe-face.md with frontmatter (id, version v1.1, targetModel [qwen-vl-max,glm-4v,gpt-4o], temperature 0.2, maxTokens 800, outputFormat json, updatedAt)
System section includes <<include:safety-rules>>
Body covers: 任务, 图片合法性判断 (5 reasons including multiple_faces), 观察维度 (10 fields), 输出格式, 1-2 examples
---USER--- separator followed by user template '请按系统指令观察以下面部照片，输出 JSON：'
loadPrompt('vision-observe-face') succeeds; meta.outputFormat === 'json'; meta.targetModel includes 'qwen-vl-max'
Test in prompts/__tests__/face-prompt.test.ts validates loaded structure

features.description: Create reading-write-palm.md prompt file — the most important prompt, per docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §五. Stage-2 LLM prompt that takes vision observation JSON and writes the palm reading matching PalmReadingResult schema.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/prompts/reading-write-palm.md with frontmatter (id, version v3.1, targetModel [deepseek-v3,qwen-plus,gpt-4o-mini], temperature 0.7, maxTokens 1500, outputFormat json)
System section includes <<include:safety-rules>> and <<include:tone-guidelines>>
Body covers: 任务, 整体定位, 撰写原则 (7 items), 固定 disclaimer 文案, 输出 Schema, icon 选择规则, 输出要求, 2 完整示例 (the standard answers from docs)
---USER--- separator with user template containing {{observations}} variable
loadPrompt('reading-write-palm') + expandIncludes resolves both safety-rules and tone-guidelines
fillTemplate with {observations:'{...}'} substitutes correctly; test in prompts/__tests__/palm-prompt.test.ts

features.description: Create reading-write-face.md prompt file per docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §六. Stage-2 LLM prompt for face reading.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/prompts/reading-write-face.md with frontmatter (id, version v2.1, targetModel [deepseek-v3,qwen-plus,gpt-4o-mini], temperature 0.7, maxTokens 1500, outputFormat json)
System includes <<include:safety-rules>> and <<include:tone-guidelines>>
Body covers: 特别强调 (4 face-reading compliance points: 不评价美丑/不预测健康/不涉及姻缘事件/映射到性格倾向), 输出 Schema, 完整示例
User template with {{observations}}
loadPrompt('reading-write-face') succeeds; expansion+fill works
Test in prompts/__tests__/face-reading-prompt.test.ts

features.description: Create daily-fortune.md prompt file per docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §七. Stage-2 LLM prompt for daily fortune card.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/prompts/daily-fortune.md with frontmatter (id, version v1.3, targetModel [deepseek-v3,qwen-turbo], temperature 0.8, maxTokens 500, outputFormat json)
System includes <<include:safety-rules>> and <<include:tone-guidelines>>
Body covers: 任务, 输出 Schema (matches DailyFortuneResult), 撰写要求 (3 items), 1 完整示例
User template with {{date}}, {{ganzhi}}, {{solarTerm}}, {{seed}} variables
loadPrompt('daily-fortune') succeeds; fillTemplate substitutes all 4 vars
Test in prompts/__tests__/daily-fortune-prompt.test.ts

features.description: VLM client with provider chain — calls Qwen-VL-Max → GLM-4V → GPT-4o (fallback). Returns parsed JSON (not stream). Server-side only; never exposes API keys.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/server/src/lib/vlm-client.ts with callVLM({model, messages, temperature, responseFormat}) function
API keys read from process.env (QWEN_API_KEY, GLM_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY) — never logged
Failure on first provider triggers retry on next provider in chain (try/catch + provider.next())
Returns string (raw JSON content from model) — caller responsible for JSON.parse + Zod validation
Image input supported via {type:'image_url', image_url:{url:dataUrl}} in messages
Throw NoProviderAvailableError if all providers fail or none have API keys
Manual smoke test: with QWEN_API_KEY env var set, call from a test endpoint with a real palm image, verify valid JSON returned

features.description: Text LLM streaming client with provider chain — DeepSeek V3 → Qwen-Plus → GPT-4o-mini. Returns AsyncIterable<string> for SSE-friendly chunk-by-chunk consumption.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/server/src/lib/llm-stream-client.ts with callLLMStream({model, messages, temperature, maxTokens, responseFormat}) returning AsyncIterable<string>
Uses fetch + ReadableStream + parser to handle SSE chunks from each provider
Provider chain: DeepSeek V3 → Qwen-Plus → GPT-4o-mini (env keys: DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, QWEN_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY)
If first provider fails after 0 chunks → silent failover to next; if fails mid-stream → propagate error
responseFormat:{type:'json_object'} forwarded to providers that support it (DeepSeek, OpenAI)
Manual smoke test: full SSE stream with sample messages, verify chunks arrive ordered and complete JSON parses

features.description: Reading service orchestrator — chains VLM observe → text LLM interpret → safety check → schema validate. Implements the pipeline from docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §十四.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/server/src/services/reading-service.ts with generatePalmReading(imageDataUrl, {onChunk?}) and generateFaceReading(imageDataUrl, {onChunk?}) functions
Stage 1: loadPrompt vision-observe-palm + expandIncludes + callVLM → JSON.parse → PalmObservationSchema.safeParse
If observation.valid===false → return {status:'rejected', reason:observation.reason}
Stage 2: loadPrompt reading-write-palm + expandIncludes + fillTemplate({observations}) + callLLMStream → accumulate buffer + onChunk callback
Stage 3: JSON.parse buffer → PalmReadingResultSchema.safeParse → checkContent on stringified result
Returns {status:'ok'|'rejected'|'failed', data?, reason?, detail?}
Manual smoke test: call with sample palm image, verify ok response with valid PalmReadingResult JSON

features.description: Fallback content service — fallback-soft.md with prebuilt 'gentle failure' JSON for palm/face/daily, plus a getFallback(type) function for the reading service to use when LLM fails.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/prompts/fallback-soft.md per docs/5完整Prompt文件.md §十二 (palm fallback JSON, face fallback similar structure, companion lines pool)
Create packages/core/src/fallbacks/index.ts with getPalmFallback(), getFaceFallback(), getDailyFallback(), getCompanionLine(category)
All fallback JSON validates against the corresponding M2-001/002/003 schemas
getCompanionLine('morning'|'idle'|'tap'|'celebrate'|'sad') returns a random string from the matching pool
Test file: fallbacks/__tests__/fallbacks.test.ts validates schema compliance + non-empty pools

features.description: Satori-friendly primitives — Box (auto display:flex), Text (font + lineHeight + color), Card (rounded + border), SectionNumber (circular 01/02 badge), Divider, Tag. Per docs/2satori长图组件.md §二.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/poster/src/primitives/{Box,Text,Card,SectionNumber,Divider,Tag}.tsx — all return satori-compatible VDOM
Box auto-applies style.display='flex' when not specified; supports flexDirection prop
Text uses fontFamily 'Noto Serif SC' by default; size/weight/color/lineHeight props all map to inline style
Card has paper background (#F8F5EE), 16px borderRadius, 1px line border (#E5DFD2), inner padding
SectionNumber renders a circular badge with gold (#9A7B3F) background and white text
All primitives composable: <Card><Box flexDirection='column'><Text>...</Text></Box></Card> renders correctly via renderToPng
Test file: primitives/__tests__/primitives.test.tsx renders each via renderToPng and asserts valid PNG output

features.description: Poster icon library — inline SVG components per docs/2satori长图组件.md §二: PalmDiagram, HeartLine, BrainLine, LeafLine, Signpost, Wave, MountainScene, RiverScene, CloudScene, LotusScene, CornerOrnament, Watermark.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/poster/src/icons/ with 12 inline SVG components
Each is a satori-compatible component returning {type:'svg', props:{viewBox, children:[...path elements]}}
Heart/Brain/Leaf are simple stroke-only icons (24x24); Signpost/Wave for auxiliary
Mountain/River/Cloud/Lotus are 'illustration' scene icons (180x120) used in summary section
Watermark renders 'CyberOracle · {date}' with QR code placeholder area
All icons use ink (#1F1B16) or gold (#9A7B3F) stroke, no fill
Test file: icons/__tests__/icons.test.tsx renders each icon via renderToPng and asserts valid output

features.description: PalmReadingPoster.tsx — full satori long-image template using rich PalmReadingResult data. Layout: title + subtitle + overview card + 3 mainLines cards with icons + 2-3 auxiliary cards + temperament + summary with illustration + disclaimer + watermark.
acceptanceSteps: Replace packages/poster/src/components/PosterLayout.tsx with PalmReadingPoster.tsx (or coexist)
Component takes PalmReadingResult data prop and renders the full long image (800px wide × ~2400px tall)
Uses primitives + icons; mainLines section shows 心/脑/生命 icons next to each line block
auxiliary section uses Signpost or Wave icon depending on item.icon
summary.illustration field selects between Mountain/River/Cloud/Lotus scene at the bottom
Right-bottom watermark via Watermark component
Snapshot test: renderToPng with sample data returns valid PNG; pixel diff vs golden < 5% (loose threshold for MVP)
Test file: components/__tests__/palm-reading-poster.test.tsx

features.description: FaceReadingPoster.tsx — full satori long-image template for face reading. Same layout pattern as PalmReadingPoster but mainLines uses eye/eyebrow/nose/mouth/face icons.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/poster/src/components/FaceReadingPoster.tsx
Takes FaceReadingResult data prop; renders 800×~2400 long image
mainLines icons: eyebrow→Eyebrow, eye→Eye, nose→Nose, mouth→Mouth, face→FaceOutline
Watermark + summary.illustration same as palm
Snapshot test: renderToPng with sample face data returns valid PNG
Test file: components/__tests__/face-reading-poster.test.tsx

features.description: DailyFortuneCard.tsx — short share-card template for daily fortune (800×1200). Layout: title + ratings (star bars) + lucky info + advice (do/avoid) + oneLine.
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/poster/src/components/DailyFortuneCard.tsx
Takes DailyFortuneResult data prop; renders 800×~1200 short card
Ratings row: 5 metrics with horizontal star/filled-bar visualization
Lucky info: color swatch + direction arrow + number badge + moment text
Advice section: do (green tint) + avoid (gold tint) blocks
oneLine rendered prominently with serif italic styling at the bottom
Snapshot test: renderToPng with sample data returns valid PNG
Test file: components/__tests__/daily-fortune-card.test.tsx

features.description: POST /api/upload — accepts image upload (FormData), validates type (image/jpeg|image/png|image/webp) + size (≤8MB), converts to WebP via sharp, saves to /storage/uploads/{id}.webp + meta.json, returns {id}.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/server/src/app/api/upload/route.ts with POST handler
FormData parsing: multipart/form-data with 'file' field + 'kind' field (palm|face)
Validation: returns 415 for non-image MIME, 413 for >8MB
Image processing: sharp resize (max 1920px) → WebP encode (quality 80)
Storage: write to /storage/uploads/{nanoid}.webp + sibling .meta.json with {kind, originalName, size, uploadedAt}
Response: {id: string} on success (200)
Add 'sharp' + 'nanoid' to apps/server dependencies
Manual test via curl: POST a sample PNG, verify 200 + id in response + file exists in /storage/uploads/

features.description: GET /api/analyze — SSE streaming endpoint that runs the reading-service pipeline. Streams PipelineEvent chunks (vlm_observe → llm_interpret → complete) using the M1-012 PipelineEvent schema.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/server/src/app/api/analyze/route.ts with GET handler that accepts ?id={uploadId}
Returns Response with content-type 'text/event-stream', cache-control 'no-cache', connection 'keep-alive'
Reads /storage/uploads/{id}.webp + .meta.json; routes to generatePalmReading or generateFaceReading based on kind

Emits PipelineEvent chunks: {step:'vlm_observe', status:'running'} → {step:'vlm_observe', status:'done', data:observations} → {step:'llm_interpret', status:'running'} → onChunk fires {step:'llm_interpret', status:'running', data:partial} → {step:'complete', status:'done', data:fullResult}
Each chunk validated against PipelineEventSchema before emission
Connection survives 30+ seconds; final chunk closes the stream
Saves final result to /storage/results/{id}.json
Manual test: curl -N http://localhost:3001/api/analyze?id={id} streams events ending with complete

features.description: POST /api/render-image — generates poster PNG from a result JSON id. Uses M1's renderToPng + the M2 poster components, saves to /storage/results/{id}.png, returns the PNG buffer.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/server/src/app/api/render-image/route.ts with POST handler accepting {id} JSON body
Reads /storage/results/{id}.json; selects PalmReadingPoster or FaceReadingPoster based on result.type or kind metadata
Calls renderToPng(<Poster data={result} />) to get PNG buffer
Saves buffer to /storage/results/{id}.png
Response: PNG buffer with content-type 'image/png'
Returns 404 if result JSON not found, 500 on render failure
Manual test: POST {id} to endpoint after a complete /api/analyze flow, verify PNG file exists + valid magic bytes

features.description: GET /api/result/:id and GET /api/result/:id/image — fetch endpoints for a result's JSON and PNG. Both return 404 for unknown ids; /image streams the PNG with appropriate cache headers.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/server/src/app/api/result/[id]/route.ts with GET → reads /storage/results/{id}.json, returns 200 or 404
Create apps/server/src/app/api/result/[id]/image/route.ts with GET → streams /storage/results/{id}.png with content-type 'image/png' + cache-control 'public, max-age=604800'
404 for missing id; 410 if metadata indicates expired (>7 days old per /storage cleanup policy from PRD §10.1)
Manual test: GET /api/result/{id} returns valid JSON; GET /api/result/{id}/image returns valid PNG

features.description: GET /api/daily — returns the daily fortune for today (cached per day). Uses M2-013 reading service style with the daily-fortune prompt + DailyFortuneResult schema.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/server/src/app/api/daily/route.ts with GET handler
Computes today's date + ganzhi + solarTerm (use 'lunar' npm package or hardcode for MVP)
Cache strategy: read /storage/index/daily.json; if today's date present, return cached; else generate via callLLMStream + daily-fortune prompt + DailyFortuneResult schema, write back to cache
Falls back to M2-014 getDailyFallback() on LLM failure
Response: DailyFortuneResult JSON with today's data
Manual test: GET /api/daily twice quickly, second response served from cache (latency <50ms)

features.description: Canvas 4-layer rendering infrastructure — sets up OffscreenCanvas (static bg) + background canvas (slow ~10fps) + main canvas (rAF 60fps) + HTML overlay div, all stacked on the home page.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/CanvasStage.tsx React component
Renders 2 stacked <canvas> elements + 1 absolute-positioned div for HTML overlay
OffscreenCanvas pre-renders the static cyberpunk background once on mount
Background canvas updates via setInterval(100ms) — frame-skip counter visible in dev tools
Main canvas runs requestAnimationFrame loop with handle for cancel on unmount
Responsive: fills viewport on 375px (mobile) and 1440px (desktop)
Update apps/web/src/app/page.tsx to render <CanvasStage />
Performance: LCP ≤ 2.5s with the stage mounted (verify via Lighthouse or CDP)

features.description: Canvas hit-detection system — bbox-based mouse interaction. Registry of clickable elements with idle/hover/active state machine; mousemove iterates elements and updates cursor + state per frame.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/hit-detection.ts with InteractiveElement interface ({id, bbox:{x,y,w,h}, onHover, onLeave, onClick})
Registry singleton holds active elements; mousemove handler iterates ≤20 elements (no perf concern)
Hover state: changes cursor to 'pointer' within bbox, fires onHover; mouseleave fires onLeave
Click state: triggers active state with 50ms feedback, fires onClick
Hit detection adds <1ms overhead per frame (verify via performance.now() instrumentation)
Test in CanvasStage by registering a sample bbox and clicking with Playwright; cursor + click callback fire

features.description: Crystal ball — idle + hover state. Internal fog rotation (conic-gradient), surface highlight sweep, base particle emission, hover acceleration + scale-up + mouse-follow parallax. Per docs/6canvas动态化交互设计spec.md §二 Layer 2.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/CrystalBall.tsx that draws to the main canvas
Renders at page center: ball circle with internal conic-gradient fog (purple #A855F7 → cyan #22D3EE) rotating at L3 frequency (2s period)
Surface highlight (white radial gradient) moves slowly across surface (glass reflection)
Base emits 5-10 particles/second upward (using the simple particle pool from M2-038, but inline if not built yet)
Hover: fog rotation accelerates to 1.5x, ball scales to 1.05x with halo expansion, fog shifts toward mouse position
Hover feedback latency <100ms (measure with Playwright clock)
Amplitude range: 80-100% (center brightness tier per spec §七)
Registers with M2-026 hit detection

features.description: Crystal ball click 4-act dramatic sequence (Setup → Build-up → Climax with 200ms freeze → Resolution). The fortune-telling flow's cornerstone interaction. Per docs/6canvas动态化交互设计spec.md §七.
acceptanceSteps: Click handler triggers a state machine with 4 acts and total duration 4-5 seconds
T+0 (Setup): scale 1.0→0.95→1.0 bounce + click feedback within 50ms
T+300-2200 (Build-up): fog accelerates, particles ×3, tarot cards fly toward ball (reuses M2-029 cards), arm extends
T+2200 (Climax): ALL animations freeze for 200ms + white screen flash
T+2400-2700 (Resolution part 1): one card selected, flies to center, flips (300ms)
T+3000-4500 (Resolution part 2): card illuminates, result text types in, gold starlight (uses M2-039 if available), CTA buttons fade in
Sequence cancellable on unmount; cleanly resets state if interrupted
Playwright test: click crystal ball, advance virtual clock through each act, snapshot at each milestone

features.description: Tarot cards — 5-card group with idle float (sine wave staggered phase), hover 3D tilt + sibling dim, click flip to reveal meaning. Per docs/6canvas动态化交互设计spec.md §二 Layer 2 Tarot section.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/TarotGroup.tsx — 5 cards rendered near crystal ball
Idle: each card vertical float (amplitude 4px, period 3s, L2 frequency layer) with unique phase offset (5 cards × 0.6s stagger)
Idle: cards sway ±2° rotation; face symbols have subtle glow outline
Hover: card rises 12px + scales 1.1x + glow intensifies; siblings dim to 70% opacity + recede 4px
Hover: 3D tilt follows mouse (perspective transform)
Click: flip animation (300ms decelerate-to-mid-accelerate easing), reveals meaning text on back; second click retracts
Each card registers with M2-026 hit detection
Playwright test: hover one card → other cards dim; click → flip; click again → unflip

features.description: Neon sign system — pre-rendered glow sprites (≤8 simultaneous shadowBlur instances) with staggered breathing + random glitch (8-12s interval, 200ms duration, slice + RGB split). Layer 1 per spec.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/NeonSigns.tsx — renders to background canvas
Pre-renders glow sprites once via OffscreenCanvas (≤8 instances live concurrently)
Main title '赛博玄学馆' pulses with random glitch every 8-12s (RGB channel split + horizontal slice offset, 200ms)
Secondary signs (e.g., '今日运势', '八字精批') breathe at L2 frequency (3s period) with staggered phase
Entry sequence on first mount: signs light up in sweep pattern (50-150ms stagger between each)
Glitch effect disabled when prefers-reduced-motion media query is active
Playwright test: wait 12s, verify glitch appears at least once; toggle reduced-motion → glitch absent

features.description: Background Layer 0 — code rain (Python-themed line-by-line highlight), data flow particles (30-50 purple/cyan, slow speed), distant neon halos (large breathing). Per docs/6canvas动态化交互设计spec.md §二 Layer 0.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/BackgroundLayer0.tsx — draws to background canvas
Code rain (top-left region): Python source-style text scrolls vertically, 1 line highlighted every 800ms
30-50 data particles (purple #A855F7 + cyan #22D3EE) float at speed 0.3-0.8px/frame
3-5 distant neon halos (large radial gradients) breathe at L0 frequency (6-10s period, opacity 0.6-0.9)
Background parallax scrolls at 0.2px/frame (horizontal)
Background canvas updates at ~10fps (verified by frame skip counter)
Playwright test: 10s capture shows code rain progression + halo breathing

features.description: Bagua diagram — slow rotation idle (20s period), hover acceleration to 8s + gold outline, click opens bazi (生辰八字) input panel as HTML overlay.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/BaguaDiagram.tsx — left-side decorative element
Idle: rotates clockwise at 20s/revolution (smooth, not stuttery)
Hover: rotation accelerates to 8s/revolution + gold (#9A7B3F) outer border glow
Click: opens an HTML overlay panel (M2-025's overlay div) with year/month/day/hour inputs + 提交 button
Panel closes on Escape or outside click
Registers with M2-026 hit detection
Playwright test: hover → rotation faster (verify rotation rate); click → panel visible; submit → console.log of values (real submit deferred)

features.description: Palm diagram — three palm lines (fate/wisdom/love) light up in cycle (idle breathing), hover all-light + scan line sweep, click triggers upload flow navigation.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/PalmDiagram.tsx — right-upper area
Idle: 3 lines each breathe in cycle (line A 0-1s, line B 1-2s, line C 2-3s, repeat)
Hover: all 3 lines fully illuminate + a horizontal scan line sweeps top-to-bottom (1s loop)
Click: navigates to /upload?kind=palm or opens an upload modal (whichever comes first per M2-042)
Click feedback within 50ms
Playwright test: hover → scan line visible; click → URL changes or modal opens

Idle: each container has a purple glow pillar rising from inside (breathing, L2 3s period)
Hover: container's label (姻缘|事业|财运) enlarges + glow intensifies + tooltip 'Click to draw' appears after 300ms delay
Click: container shakes (5 frames at 50ms intervals) → 1 stick flies up with spring physics (popmotion or hand-rolled spring) → lands above with bounce → stick text fades in character-by-character
Each container's click navigates to its category fortune flow (deferred to M2-042; for now, console.log)
Playwright test: 3 containers render; hover middle one → tooltip; click → animation plays

features.description: Cyber cat — idle tail sway + random eye expression + rainbow collar LEDs, hover head tilt, click triggers fortune stick draw (reuses M2-034 stick animation).

Idle: tail sways (sine wave, 2s period); eyes randomly become >_< for 500ms every ~10s; collar 5-LED strip cycles rainbow colors
Hover: head tilts ~15° toward cursor
Click: triggers fortune stick draw animation (calls into M2-034's draw function with category='general')
Eye expression uses L5 random layer (per spec §七 rhythm layering)
Playwright test: cat renders; hover → head tilt; click → stick animation triggers

features.description: Oracle girl character — central decorative avatar with idle blink (4-7s random), hair vertex sway, halo rotation (6s period), body breathing float (±2px). Click triggers a speech bubble with oracle line.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/OracleGirl.tsx — central decorative element
Idle: eyes blink every 4-7s (random interval); subtle hair vertex perturbation; halo (above head) rotates at 6s period; body floats ±2px (breathing)
Left-hand 'screen' shows scrolling 'Analyzing...' text
Click body: HTML overlay speech bubble with random line from companion-tap-reaction pool (M2-014 fallbacks)
Bubble auto-dismisses after 3s

features.description: AI poetry scroll — right-bottom decorative scroll with idle golden flow effect, hover partial reveal, click expand + AI-generate 4-line poem.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/PoetryScroll.tsx — right-bottom area
Idle: scroll edge has cycling golden flow effect (gradient animation, 3s loop)
Hover: scroll partially expands (0.8s ease-out), shows label 'Click to reveal full poem'
Click: scroll expand animation → calls /api/quick-ask or stub LLM endpoint to get a 4-line poem → poem text appears with character-by-character typing effect (50ms per char)
For MVP: stub the API call with hardcoded 4 lines; real LLM hook in M3
Playwright test: hover → label visible; click → full expansion + typed poem

features.description: Ambient particle system — object-pooled ambient dust (80-120 falling purple particles, full screen, slow speed), tier-based count (50 low / 100 mid / 150 high). Per docs/6canvas动态化交互设计spec.md §二 Layer 4.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/particles.ts with ParticlePool class (preallocated array, no new allocations per frame)
renderAmbientParticles(ctx, count) draws purple dust particles (size 1-3px) falling at 0.5-1.2px/frame
Particles wrap around screen edges (recycle from pool)
Count adapts per device tier (defaults to 100 mid; will be wired to M2-040)
prefers-reduced-motion → count = 0
Performance: with 150 particles, main canvas stays ≥45fps (measured via Performance API)
Playwright test: 100 particles visible after 1s; toggle reduced-motion → 0 particles

features.description: Fortune sequence particles — 200+ burst from crystal ball during click sequence + gold starlight from result panel at reveal. Particles recycle to pool after life expires.
acceptanceSteps: Extend ParticlePool with burst(originX, originY, count, color, lifeMs) method
During M2-028 click sequence: at T+300, burst 200+ particles radially from crystal ball center (1.5s life)
At T+3000 (resolution): gold starlight (50 particles) radiates from result panel position (2s life)
Particles fade (alpha decay over life) and recycle back to pool
Burst does not drop frame rate below 30fps on a Throttled CPU 4× simulation in DevTools
Playwright test: trigger crystal ball click → particles visible during build-up + climax + resolution

features.description: Performance degradation system — auto-detect device tier via WebGL renderer string + RAM, applies low/mid/high config to particle count + shadowBlur + glitch. Honors prefers-reduced-motion as low-tier.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/components/canvas/perf-tier.ts with detectPerformanceTier(): 'high'|'mid'|'low'
Detection: WebGL renderer string regex (Apple GPU/Adreno 6xx+/Mali G7x+ → high), navigator.deviceMemory + hardwareConcurrency thresholds
Low tier config: particles count=50, shadowBlur=0, glitch disabled, simplified halos
Mid tier (default): particles=100, shadowBlur≤4 instances, glitch enabled
High tier: particles=150, shadowBlur≤8, all effects enabled
prefers-reduced-motion → forces low tier + provides UI toggle in settings panel
All 9 interaction elements remain functional in low tier (just less flashy)
Playwright test: simulate low-tier (override detect to return 'low'); verify shadowBlur=0 + particles=50 + glitch absent

features.description: Easter eggs (midnight visit color shift + cat belly-up rollover) + rhythm layering verification. Per docs/6canvas动态化交互设计spec.md §三 Easter eggs and §六 Checklist.
acceptanceSteps: Midnight egg: visiting between 0:00-3:00 local time shifts overall color temperature colder (CSS filter: hue-rotate(20deg) saturate(0.85) on canvas wrapper); '夜半凶兆' text briefly appears at top

Cat belly-up egg: 10 consecutive clicks on cyber cat within 30s triggers a roll-over animation (cat lies belly-up for 2s); 60s cooldown before re-triggering; does not interfere with click-to-draw-fortune
Rhythm verification: dev-only debug overlay listing all animated elements with frequency layer + phase offset; verify no two elements share same layer with phase=0 (assert at runtime, log warnings)
Amplitude check: dev-only assertion that center elements (crystal ball) hit 80-100%, mid elements 70-95%, edges 60-85%, bg 30-60%
Playwright test: mock Date to 1:00am → verify color shift; click cat 10× rapidly → belly-up animation

features.description: Result page (/result/[id]) — SSE-streamed result display with loading animation, incremental section reveal, poster preview iframe, export button. Connects to /api/analyze + /api/result/:id/image.
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/app/result/[id]/page.tsx as a client component
On mount: open EventSource('/api/analyze?id=...'), parse PipelineEvent chunks
During streaming: show crystal ball + progress bar (matches phases vlm_observe/llm_interpret/complete)
Result sections appear incrementally as the JSON accumulates (progressive reveal)
After 'complete' event: trigger /api/render-image POST, then show preview
Export button: triggers download of the PNG (anchor with download attribute)
Playwright test: navigate to /result/{seed-id}, verify SSE chunks render progressively, poster preview loads, export downloads PNG

features.description: History page (/history) — displays recent readings stored in IndexedDB (max 20) via Dexie.js. Each item has date, type, thumbnail, click → /result/{id}.
acceptanceSteps: Add 'dexie' dependency to apps/web; create apps/web/src/lib/history-db.ts with Dexie schema (id, type, date, summary, thumbnailUrl)
On result page complete: insert {id, type, date, summary} into IndexedDB; max 20 (delete oldest if over)
Create apps/web/src/app/history/page.tsx that lists IDB entries sorted by date desc
Each item: date + type icon + summary excerpt + thumbnail (from /api/result/:id/image with object-fit:cover)
Click item → navigate to /result/{id}
Empty state: '还没有解读记录' helpful message + CTA to home
Playwright test: complete a reading → verify history entry appears; click → result page loads

features.description: Share page (/share/[id]) + Download page stub (/download). /share renders a publicly-viewable result with funnel CTA at top; /download shows desktop client coming-soon page with platform buttons (per PRD §6.2).
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/src/app/share/[id]/page.tsx — fetches /api/result/:id, renders the result content + a fixed top bar 'Get the desktop companion' linking to /download

Top-of-share funnel: visible above the fold on /share/[id]
Both pages SEO-friendly: meta title + description per PRD §一 (轻量试玩 + 病毒传播 + 客户端获取入口)
Playwright test: /share/{seed-id} renders content + visible CTA; /download renders + 3 platform buttons present

features.description: End-to-end user journey verification — full path from home → click crystal ball → fortune sequence → result streaming → poster export → history entry → share page. Validates the complete M2 pipeline.
acceptanceSteps: Navigate to home page (http://localhost:3000)
Wait for canvas stage to mount + crystal ball visible
Click crystal ball → 4-act sequence plays (verify each act milestone)
Result page loads via SSE → all sections appear within 25s (per PRD §12.1 budget)
Click export → PNG downloads
Navigate to /history → verify newest entry matches just-completed reading
Click history entry → /result/{id} loads with cached PNG (no re-streaming)
Navigate to /share/{id} from result page → public view loads with funnel CTA
Verify Lighthouse perf score ≥80 on home page; LCP ≤2.5s; JS gzip ≤220KB
